task: Fix a typo in the README: 'recieve' should be 'receive'.

Update the copyright year in LICENSE from 2025 to 2026.
Update the lodash dependency from 4.17.20 to 4.17.21 in package.json.
Fix a misleading code comment in src/utils/date.ts — it says 'returns ms' but it returns seconds.

task: Set 'strict': true in tsconfig.json.
notes: 1 file, config one-liner (no code follows here).

task: Rename the constant DEFAULT_TIMEOUT to DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS in src/config.ts (single definition + no other refs).
Fix a broken relative link in docs/intro.md that points to ./setup.md (should be ../setup.md).
Change the default PORT in .env.example from 3000 to 8080.
Add a one-line entry to CHANGELOG.md under Unreleased for the toggle fix.
Fix a null-pointer bug in src/cart/total.ts where an empty cart throws; add a unit test for the empty case.
Add an optional 'disabled' prop to the Button component and forward it to the underlying <button>.
Add a --verbose flag to the existing CLI that prints debug logs.
Add a formatCurrency(amount, currency) util and use it in the price label; include tests.
Add email-format validation to the signup form field with an inline error message.
Fix an off-by-one in pagination so the last page renders; add a regression test.
Rename the getUser() function to fetchUser() and update its 3 call sites.

task: Change the default sort of the table to 'date desc' and add a test asserting order.
Debounce the search input by 300ms in the existing SearchBar component.
Show a toast on API error in the existing useOrders hook (toast util already exists).
Add user authentication (login, session, protected routes) to the app end-to-end.
Refactor the API client to use a retry-with-backoff strategy across all callers.
Add a 'soft delete' feature: schema migration, repository changes, and API updates.
Move the shared types into a new package and update the web and mobile packages to consume it.
Investigate and fix a memory leak somewhere in the streaming pipeline — I'm not sure which layer.
Introduce a global state store and migrate the cart, auth, and theme contexts onto it.
Rework list rendering to virtualize and memoize across the dashboard's five heavy tables.
Build a CSV export feature: backend endpoint, streaming, and a frontend download button with progress.
Decide and implement how we paginate the activity feed (cursor vs offset) across API and UI.
Replace moment.js with date-fns throughout the codebase (dozens of call sites).
notes: 4+ files / many call sites with semantics to preserve.
